name: Marlon
description: Marlon is a 6’2 buffalo. He is suuuuuper fluffy. He doesn’t have any horns, because of a genetic disorder, so he wears prop horns a lot. He has fur covering his eyes, but when it’s pulled up, you can see his nice emerald green eyes. He likes baking, computers, and cuddles!
creator: Jamiesocool
